hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Luxury sports car with mirror-like ceramic coating finish parked in a residential driveway, beaded water droplets showing hydrophobic coating, professional detailer in uniform finishing polishing, photorealistic, no text or logos, no signage, golden-hour natural light, premium aesthetic.
hero.caption_context: Luxury + ceramic coating is the positioning. Hero should read premium, not volume-economy. Cybertruck or luxury sports car reinforces own-site portfolio. Mirror shine + water-beading visual cues communicate ceramic outcome, not just wash-and-wax.

gallery.context: Professional applying ceramic coating with applicator pad on luxury vehicle. Caption 'Ceramic coating — 5-year protection, hydrophobic, UV-resistant'.
Luxury-car leather interior after deep cleaning. Caption 'Interior — deep clean, leather conditioning, full vacuum'.
Hand wash + wax on mid-tier vehicle (not exclusively luxury). Caption 'Exterior — hand wash + wax, two-bucket method'.
Mobile detailing setup in customer driveway — water tank, tools, canopy. Caption 'Mobile — we come to you, metro Atlanta'.
Before/after headlight restoration — signals premium add-on scope. Caption 'Headlight restoration — clear optics, safer night driving'.
Owner Darren or crew at work on a vehicle. Caption names Darren if surfaced — reinforces owner-operator brand.

sections.context: Alpharetta / Johns Creek / Suwanee / Duluth / Roswell residential streetscape; own-site gallery has real vehicle photos that may be reusable for section backgrounds

notes: Auto detailing vertical with ceramic-coating luxury positioning. Slightly brighter/more saturated filter than typical trade vertical (brightness 1.02, saturate 1.08) to reinforce premium/mirror-finish aesthetic vs the utility tone of plumbing/HVAC. Own-site gallery has real portfolio photos (Cybertruck, Lexus NX, Honda Prelude) — Bruce should preserve these over stock. At least 1 slot (mobile setup) must communicate the 'we come to you' differentiator — that's the moat vs in-shop detailers.
